metadata.description: C6 audit checks for pre-projector features and train-mode random-init LeWM behavior.

sign_reversal.description: negative C_real_z vs C_real_state per-pair Spearman pairs

v1_favorable.description: V1-favorable D3xR0 and D3xR3 cells from Track A metadata

ordinary.description: Complement of invisible_quadrant, sign_reversal, latent_favorable, and v1_favorable

pixel_preparation.note: Simulator replay and V1 validation were performed once before the random-seed encoding loop.

metadata.s2_pre_projector_definition: ViT CLS token before projector: model.encoder(...).last_hidden_state[:, 0]
metadata.s3_train_mode_note: model.train() is set before torch.inference_mode(); inference_mode disables gradients only.

encode_metadata.gradient_context: torch.inference_mode() only disables gradients; model.train() controls BN/Dropout behavior
